overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game (Ghost of Tsushima) showing a samurai character wearing a traditional straw hat and robes standing on a wooden temple balcony. The character overlooks a dramatic mountain landscape with sun rays breaking through heavy clouds, creating a contemplative atmosphere with deep blue tones and wind-moving elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple balcony overlooking cloud-filled mountain valley

events.description: sun rays shift and intensify as clouds move across the sky, altering the light patterns on the distant mountains
wind gust causes the character's robes and nearby tree foliage to ripple and sway

agents.ego_description: samurai stands still on temple balcony, gazing contemplatively at the dramatic cloudscape and distant mountains while wind moves through clothing

entered.detail: dark wooden railing at the edge of the balcony overlooking the valley
traditional wooden temple roof with supporting post providing partial shelter
layered mountain peaks visible through clouds in the far distance
thick clouds and fog filling the valley below with sun rays piercing through
pine tree branches swaying in the wind beside the character
planked wooden deck surface of the temple balcony

segments.scene_description: The segment presents a static, contemplative scene from a third-person perspective showing a samurai standing on a traditional wooden temple balcony. The character faces a breathtaking view of distant mountains emerging from a sea of clouds, with dramatic sun rays breaking through the overcast sky. The wind gently moves the character's robes and the nearby tree foliage while the camera remains steady, capturing the serene atmosphere of the mountain shrine overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, contemplative vista from a mountain shrine that emphasizes the serene scale of the surrounding wilderness. It begins with a third-person perspective of a samurai standing on a traditional wooden temple balcony, overlooking a sea of clouds. As the camera holds its position, dramatic sun rays break through the overcast sky to illuminate distant mountains emerging from the mist. The scene remains steady, allowing the wind to gently stir the character's robes and the nearby tree foliage, finally settling into a moment of deep atmospheric stillness.
